'''Ne'lear''' was a [[Kian'thar]] [[loan shark]]. Some years before [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]], Ne'lear hired [[Gand/Legends|Gand]] [[Findsman/Legends|findsman]] [[Lu'daal-ud]].<ref name="AIR" />
